title: SoulGuard
description: This is a mod designed at bringing 'Dead Souls' to Fabric with some improvements and additional features. Dead Souls heavily inspired this mod.
body:
This is a mod designed at bringing 'Dead Souls' to Fabric with some improvements and additional features. Dead Souls heavily inspired this mod.

Fully customizable floating particles known as souls. Designed to be fair and not overpowered, you can choose when the souls will despawn (if ever) You can also choose who has access to each soul. If you like you can also modify the amount of the players XP that will get stored on death! If you prefer to have it a little easier, players can be allowed to teleport to their souls by changing the configuration. Admins and Mods can also check on each soul and inspect it or remove it along with many other features.

Here is a link to the original project for Dead Souls. https://github.com/Darkyenus/DeadSouls

Codded by: Minenash

Sponsored/Designed by: VoidLock

Inspired by: https://github.com/Darkyenus/DeadSouls
